scenes.title: The Vault of Eternal Winds
scenes.author: Jofi
scenes.description: An epic sky-ship expedition to a ruined temple floating inside a perpetual electrical superstorm. Breach the ancient defenses and retrieve the Core of Winds.
scenes.starting_location: Floating Docks of the Sky Temple

scenes.title: The Abyssal Trench
scenes.author: Jofi
scenes.description: A high-stakes deep-sea submarine expedition to the bottom of the Mariana Trench to retrieve a lost research capsule.

scenes.title: Reincarnated as the Unwanted Sage
scenes.author: Jofi
scenes.description: Summoned to a grand royal throne room, your magic aptitude registers as absolute zero, resulting in immediate banishment. Little do they know, this is the key to an ancient cheat power.

scenes.title: Sky-Pirate Boarding Action
scenes.author: Jofi
scenes.description: A thrilling steampunk sky-combat scenario. Defend your cargo frigate from an aggressive boarding party of ruthless sky-pirates under a dark, storm-filled sky.
scenes.starting_location: Upper Deck of The Iron Maiden

scenes.title: Infiltration of the Neon Hive
scenes.author: Jofi
scenes.description: A high-stakes cyberpunk infiltration mission. Sneak through a ruined, automated corporate bio-lab to retrieve encrypted research data.

scenes.title: Rainy Day Library Sanctuary
scenes.author: Jofi
scenes.description: A cozy, romantic slice-of-life scenario. Shelter from a heavy rainstorm inside the quiet academy library, sharing a desk, whispering secrets, and letting emotional tension rise.
scenes.starting_location: Cozy Corner of the School Library

scenes.title: The Last Supermarket
scenes.author: Jofi
scenes.description: A grounded, tactical zombie survival scenario. Scavenge for vital medical supplies inside an abandoned, barricaded mall while keeping noise to an absolute minimum.

scenes.title: The Whispering Manor
scenes.author: Jofi
scenes.description: A surreal psychological horror mystery. Explore a shifting, liminal estate where rooms change layout based on the characters' inner guilt.
